节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Enum for the mode of the tab bar when selected.
Enum for the layout mode of the content in the tab bar.
The the content is laid vertically or horizontally, according to its width.
The the content is laid vertically
The the content is laid horizontally
Provide an interface for the style of an indicator including color, height, width, border radius and margin top
Color of the indicator and board.
Height of the indicator. It cannot be set in percentage.
Width of the indicator. It cannot be set in percentage. If it is 0, the width will be equal to the width of the content
Rounded corner radius of the indicator. It cannot be set in percentage.
Spacing between the indicator and text.It cannot be set in percentage.
Provide an interface for the style of an SubTabBar indicator including color, height, width, border radius and margin top
Define the color of the indicator
Define the height of the indicator
Define the width of the indicator. If it is 0, the width will be equal to the width of the content
Define the border radius of the indicator
Define the margin top of the indicator
Provide an interface for the style of an indicator including border radius
Define the border radius of the board
LabelStyle object.
Display mode when the label text is too long.
Maximum number of lines in the label text.
Minimum font size of the label text.
Maximum font size of the label text.
How the adaptive height is determined for the label text.
Font of the label text. When setting the tabBar to BottomTabBarStyle, the default font size is 10.0fp. When setting the tabBar to SubTabBarStyle, the default font size is 16.0fp.
Font color of the label text when it is selected.
Font color of the label text when it is not selected.
TabBarLabelStyle object.
overflow mode.
Label max lines.
Min font size for adapted height.
Max font size for adapted height.
Adapt text height option.
Font style.
The text color of the selected tab bar.
The text color of the unselected tab bar.
TabBarIconStyle object.
The icon color of the selected tab bar.
The icon color of the unselected tab bar.
TabBarSymbol object.
Symbol icon in the normal style.
Symbol icon in the selected style.
Icon and text for TabBar.

TabBar icon. Anonymous Object Rectification

NOTE:
If the icon uses an SVG image, the width and height attributes of the SVG image must be deleted. Otherwise, the icon size will be determined by the width and height attributes of the SVG image.
TabBar text. Anonymous Object Rectification
Define SubTabBarStyle, the style is text and underline.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the display mode of the selected subtab.

NOTE:
It takes effect only in the horizontal layout.
注释信息: @param { SelectedMode } value - display mode of the selected subtab. Default value is SelectedMode.INDICATOR.
@returns { SubTabBarStyle } the style of the sub tab bar

parameters.说明: display mode of the selected subtab. Default value is SelectedMode.INDICATOR.

节点.return_description: the style of the sub tab bar

节点.功能描述:
Sets the background style (board style) of the selected subtab.

NOTE:
It takes effect only in the horizontal layout.

@returns { SubTabBarStyle } the style of the sub tab bar

parameters.说明: background style object for the selected subtab.

节点.功能描述:
Set the padding of the sub tab bar

NOTE:
It cannot be set in percentage.
When the parameter is of the Dimension type, the value applies to all sides.

left: 8.0vp, right: 8.0vp, top: 17.0vp, bottom: 18.0vp.
注释信息: @param { Padding | Dimension } value - indicates the padding of the sub tab bar, default value:
@returns { SubTabBarStyle } the style of the sub tab bar

parameters.说明: indicates the padding of the sub tab bar, default value:

节点.return_description: the style of the sub tab bar

节点.功能描述:
Set the padding of the sub tab bar

NOTE:
This API supports mirroring but does not support percentage-based settings.

start: LengthMetircs.vp(8), end: LengthMetircs.vp(8), top: LengthMetircs.vp(17), bottom: LengthMetircs.vp(18).
注释信息: @param { LocalizedPadding } padding - indicates the padding of the sub tab bar, default value:
@returns { SubTabBarStyle } the style of the sub tab bar

parameters.说明: indicates the padding of the sub tab bar, default value:

节点.功能描述:
Set the padding of the bottom tab bar

NOTE:
It cannot be set in percentage.
When the parameter is of the Dimension type, the value applies to all sides.

Default value is { left:4.0vp, right:4.0vp, top:0.0vp, bottom:0.0vp }.
注释信息: @param { Padding | Dimension | LocalizedPadding } value - indicates the padding of the bottom tab bar
@returns { BottomTabBarStyle } the style of the bottom tab bar

parameters.说明: indicates the padding of the bottom tab bar

节点.return_description: the style of the bottom tab bar

节点.功能描述: Sets the layout mode of the images and texts on the bottom tab. Default value is LayoutMode.VERTICAL.

@returns { BottomTabBarStyle } the style of the bottom tab bar

parameters.说明: layout mode of the images and text on the bottom tab.

节点.return_description: the style of the bottom tab bar

节点.功能描述: Sets the vertical alignment mode of the images and text on the bottom tab. Default value is VerticalAlign.Center.

@returns { BottomTabBarStyle } the style of the bottom tab bar

parameters.说明: vertical alignment mode of the images and text on the bottom tab.

节点.return_description: the style of the bottom tab bar

节点.功能描述:
Sets whether the images and text on the bottom tab can be symmetrically extended by the minimum value of the available space on the left and right bottom tabs.

NOTE:
This parameter is valid only between bottom tabs in fixed horizontal mode.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - indicates whether the bottom tab bar is extensible. Default value is false.
@returns { BottomTabBarStyle } the style of the bottom tab bar

parameters.说明: indicates whether the bottom tab bar is extensible. Default value is false.

节点.return_description: the style of the bottom tab bar

节点.功能描述: Provides an interface for switching the content view on a tab page.
Called when the content view of the switch tab is set.
Defines the attribute functions of TabContent.

Sets the content displayed on the tab bar. Anonymous Object Rectification

NOTE:
If the content set exceeds the space provided by the tab bar, it will be clipped.
注释信息: @param { string | Resource | CustomBuilder | TabBarOptions } options - Content displayed on the tab bar.

parameters.说明: Content displayed on the tab bar.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the content displayed on the tab bar.

NOTE:
The bottom tab style does not include an indicator.
When an icon display error occurs, a gray blank block is displayed.
注释信息: @param { SubTabBarStyle | BottomTabBarStyle } value - Content displayed on the tab bar.

parameters.说明: Content displayed on the tab bar.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the content displayed on the tab bar. Anonymous Object Rectification

NOTE:
If BottomTabBarStyle or TabBarOptions is used and an icon is set, a gray block will be displayed if the icon is invalid.
If the content exceeds the space provided by the tab bar, it will be clipped.

Content displayed on the tab bar.
注释信息: @param { ComponentContent | SubTabBarStyle | BottomTabBarStyle | string | Resource | CustomBuilder | TabBarOptions } content

parameters.类型: ComponentContent | SubTabBarStyle | BottomTabBarStyle | string | Resource | CustomBuilder | TabBarOptions
